/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/mytest.out.dir/src/Calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mytest.out.dir/src/factorielle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mytest.out.dir/tests/mytestTP1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mytest.out.dir/tests/mytestTP2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mytest.out.dir/tests/testCalculator.cpp.o -o mytest.out  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
